summary: Add real OAuth login flow (loopback + PKCE S256) replacing the pasted-token UX. Wires the token endpoint that the Press left empty and adds auth login/set-client/forget commands.
reason: The Printing Press emitted half a refresh-token flow (config fields, refreshAccessToken function, SaveTokens/ClearTokens helpers) but left tokenURL hardcoded empty, so refresh was a silent no-op. Users had to re-paste a 1-hour token from the OAuth Playground every hour. Filed upstream as cli-printing-press#1200 so future OAuth CLIs ship with a working login flow by default.
validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test ./... all clean. Live: auth login flow completes end-to-end, tokens persist, auto-refresh works on natural and forced expiry, webmasters list-sites returns real data.
